summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of ValuationBoostOpportunities component. All 10 features verified working correctly with 100% pass rate. Component renders metric-based opportunities with deterministic calculations and falls back to generic recommendations when no data.

issues: Console warning: 'Missing Description or aria-describedby' for DialogContent - accessibility improvement recommended but not blocking

passed_tests: Dashboard - 4 opportunity cards display (within 3-5 range) based on metrics ✓
Dashboard - Each card has title, description, and impact label (+$800K, +$1.2M, +$640K, +$560K) ✓
Dashboard - 'High Priority' badge appears on high priority items (Reduce Founder Dependency when founder_hours > 35) ✓
Dashboard - Clicking card opens detail modal ✓
Dashboard - Modal shows title, details, impact amount, and recommended actions (3 numbered actions) ✓
Dashboard - Total potential impact shown in header ('Up to $3.2M potential increase') and footer ('Potential valuation: $11.2M') ✓
Dashboard - Fallback generic recommendations shown when no valuations (3 generic cards with 'High Impact' labels) ✓
Dashboard - Impact calculations based on metrics: growth_rate<50 (15%), nrr<110 (12%), gross_margin<80 (8%), founder_hours>25 (10%), predictability (7%) ✓
Dashboard - Opportunities sorted by priority (high priority first) ✓
Dashboard - Card colored backgrounds: amber (operations), emerald (growth), purple (margin), cyan (predictability), blue (retention) ✓
Dashboard - 'Got it' button in modal works to close dialog ✓

features_verified: Uses data-testid='opportunity-{id}' for each card (e.g., opportunity-growth-rate)
Generates metric-based opportunities from latestValuation.metrics and result
Falls back to 3 generic opportunities when metrics.currentValuation === 0
Calculates impact as percentage of currentValuation: growth(15%), nrr(12%), margin(8%), founder(10%), predictability(7%)
Priority determination: high when growth_rate<20, nrr<100, gross_margin<60, founder_hours>35
Sorts opportunities by priority (high first) and limits to 5
Uses Dialog component for modal with DialogContent, DialogHeader, DialogTitle
Modal shows details, impact label, and actions array
totalPotentialImpact calculated as sum of all opportunity impacts
Card colors: emerald, blue, purple, amber, cyan with matching bg/text/icon classes
Conditional rendering: shows only when projects.length > 0

critical_code_review_comments: ValuationBoostOpportunities correctly implements all requirements per PRD
Deterministic calculations based on actual metrics - verified with test data
Fallback mechanism works correctly when no valuation data available
Minor: Add aria-describedby to DialogContent for better accessibility
test_credentials: session_boost_test_1772296416797 (user with metrics: growth_rate=45, gross_margin=75, nrr=110, founder_hours=40, valuation=$8M), session_boost_1772296310086 (user with no valid valuations - fallback test)
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data from iteration_9/10: user_dashboard_snapshot_1772294140681 with 2 valuations ($8M, $6M) and founder_hours_per_week=40
context_for_next_testing_agent: ValuationBoostOpportunities component fully tested and working. Key test IDs: valuation-boost-section, opportunity-{id}. Component generates metric-based opportunities when valuations exist (growth_rate<50, nrr<110, gross_margin<80, founder_hours>25, predictability). Falls back to 3 generic opportunities with 'High Impact'/'Medium Impact' labels when no data. Modal uses Dialog component with 'Got it' button. Card colors: emerald (growth), blue (retention), purple (margin), amber (operations), cyan (predictability). Impact shown as formatted currency (+$800K, +$1.2M).
